utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. (2) financing: includes down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, term, amortization, and estimated monthly payment — fully specified. (3) legal_services: provider, package, cost — fully specified. (4) moving_services: provider, package, cost — fully specified. (5) setup_services: includes home inspection and utilities connection with providers, packages, and costs — fully specified. (6) total_budget: includes cost breakdown and total estimated cost — fully specified. Therefore, 6/6 items are included and complete.

We identify each matching item by exact or closest naming used in the ratings and map to its given rating: Property type aligns with 'Family House' in purchase_properties due to 140m² family home characteristics and school district; Financing aligns with 'Traditional Mortgage'; Legal services match 'Premium Legal Package'; Moving services match 'Premium Moving'; Home inspection matches 'Full Structural Survey'; Utilities setup matches 'Premium Utilities'.
